title: Robinhood (HOOD) Q1 Earnings Today — What Investors Need to Watch
text: Pre-earnings analysis identifying key metrics and expectations for Robinhood Q1 2026 results. Earnings Preview: Robinhood was expected to announce Q1 2026 earnings on April 28, 2026, with significant implications for fintech sector sentiment. Key Metrics to Monitor: Cryptocurrency Revenue: This was expected to be the critical watch item given crypto market weakness in early 2026. Q1 2023 and Q1 2024 crypto revenues had shown explosive growth, so YoY comparisons were important. Trading Volumes: Expected continued strength in options and equities trading to offset potential crypto weakness. Guidance Forward: Management commentary on expectations for potential Pattern Day Trader rule change was anticipated. Gold Subscriber Growth: Expected to continue robust expansion as recurring revenue driver. Analyst Consensus: Revenue expectation near $1.14-1.18 billion, EPS near $0.39-0.41. Investor Concerns: Uncertainty about crypto market direction and retail trading volume sustainability. Retail investor participation patterns during period of elevated market volatility. Competitive dynamics with other fintech platforms. Positive Expectations: Expansion of prediction markets as new revenue stream. International expansion progress. Recurring revenue growth from subscription services.
